001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.player;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.player.BoxPlayer;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007import java.util.Objects;
008
009/**
010 * A {@link PlayerEvent} called when the player changed the {@link StockHolder}.
011 */
012public class PlayerStockHolderChangeEvent extends PlayerEvent {
013
014    private final StockHolder previous;
015
016    /**
017     * The constructor of a {@link PlayerStockHolderChangeEvent}.
018     *
019     * @param boxPlayer the player of this event
020     * @param previous the previous {@link StockHolder}
021     */
022    public PlayerStockHolderChangeEvent(@NotNull BoxPlayer boxPlayer,
023                                        @NotNull StockHolder previous) {
024        super(boxPlayer);
025        this.previous = Objects.requireNonNull(previous);
026    }
027
028    /**
029     * Gets the previous {@link StockHolder} of the player.
030     *
031     * @return the previous {@link StockHolder} of the player
032     */
033    public @NotNull StockHolder getPreviousStockHolder() {
034        return previous;
035    }
036}
